name: iTrapped - April fools 2012
description:
TW: Online sexual harassment

Crazy time to be an admin🫩

ੈ✩‧₊˚༺Sneak peak༻ੈ✩‧₊˚

This was bad- you needed to find and ban him off the platform as quickly as possible, and get your main account back. But- just as you were about to go email Shedletsky about this, you saw your alt account had a DM. You clicked on it and it was from iTrapped. “Want your account back? Sends nudes LOL!” Read the first message, followed up by his phone number. God- that’s disgusting.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

i am elliots number one fan

i love old roblox lore, watching them hack was like watching reality tv
creator: starships!
